weekly picks (Apr 1 week 2026)

Posted on April 6, 2026 in 2026apr,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

04/07

  1. s41467-026-71611-9 Metasurface-enhanced mid-infrared imaging spectroscopy with broadband quantum cascade lasers (Nature Communications)
